seoTitle: Oxley Park vs Oyster Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Oxley Park and Oyster Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Oxley Park vs Oyster Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Oxley Park and Oyster Bay.
heading: Oxley Park vs Oyster Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Oxley Park, New South Wales and Oyster Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oyster Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Oxley Park (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Oxley Park or Oyster Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Oxley Park has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Oyster Bay scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Oxley Park scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Oyster Bay scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Oxley Park or Oyster Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oyster Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
